name: che-transport-mcp
description: Taiwan TDX transport MCP — 24 tools across Rail / Bus / Bike / Air / Traffic / Parking, incl. transit_route (TRA↔Taipei-Metro multi-modal time-dependent routing) + rail_route (TRA time-dependent) + metro_find_route. Wraps PsychQuant/che-transport-mcp binary with version-aware auto-download (release-pinned + sha256 sidecar), 3-tier cache TTL, parallel cross-system station search, NSQL confirmation discipline. Built-in --setup (getpass-hidden secret; delegates to che-keychain native dialog when installed).
